summary: Completed comprehensive testing of auto trading model with confluence and confidence analysis for MNQ, MES, MYM, M2K micro futures. All backend APIs and frontend auto trading functionality working correctly. Configuration management, evaluation system, and risk management features all functional.
passed_tests: Backend API /api/autotrading/config GET returns default configuration with all required fields
Backend API /api/autotrading/config POST saves configuration successfully
Backend API /api/autotrading/evaluate evaluates symbol and returns conditions status with confluence/confidence scores
Backend API /api/autotrading/state returns trading state with positions and daily stats
Backend API /api/autotrading/signals returns signal history with proper pagination
Frontend Auto Trade button in header opens modal correctly
Frontend modal shows Entry Conditions configuration section
Frontend modal shows Risk Management configuration section
Frontend modal shows Min Confluence Score input field (working - updated to 75)
Frontend modal shows Min Confidence Score input field (working - updated to 65)
Frontend modal shows VIX range inputs for volatility filtering
Frontend modal shows Volume Ratio input for volume filtering
Frontend modal shows MTF Alignment and Paper Trading toggles
Frontend modal shows Default Quantity and ATR Stop Multiplier inputs
Frontend modal shows Max Daily Trades input for risk management
Frontend Evaluate button triggers evaluation and shows results
Frontend evaluation results show signal direction and conditions met status
Frontend evaluation results show detailed conditions grid with pass/fail indicators
Frontend Save Configuration button saves settings successfully
Frontend modal close functionality works properly
All asset selectors (MNQ, MES, MYM, M2K) working correctly
All timeframe selectors (4H, 1H, 5M) working correctly
Refresh Analysis button triggers market analysis successfully
Run Backtest button executes backtesting functionality
TradingView chart integration working correctly
SignalStack integration fully functional (from previous testing)
Multi-timeframe confluence analysis displaying correctly
Confluence and confidence score displays with proper thresholds
Predictive and confirmatory indicators sections populated
Real-time market data integration working

success_percentage.backend: 100% (16/16 endpoints working including 5 auto trading APIs)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all auto trading modal components and interactions working)
success_percentage.integration: 100% (auto trading evaluation and configuration working correctly)
